prompt: I'm scoping a migration of our analytics data platform off on-prem into the cloud (AWS to Azure for the data warehouse). Some of it is customer financial data. Who should I be talking to before we commit to this?

assertions.text: Includes Anika Sharma (Head of Data Architecture) as a relevant stakeholder
assertions.rationale: Data platform migration is squarely her remit.
Cloud landing zones / AWS-Azure target is his remit.

assertions.text: Includes Charlotte Dubois (Compliance) because customer financial data is in scope
assertions.rationale: Regulated/customer data triggers the compliance concern axis.

assertions.text: Every listed stakeholder has a relevancy score from 1 to 10
Every listed stakeholder has a written rationale naming why they are relevant (remit/concern/structural)
Stakeholders are ordered by relevancy score, highest first
Does not list any person who is not one of the six entries in the synthetic-data folder (no fabricated people)
Payments-specialist people (e.g. Aisha Khan, Bram Hendriks) are NOT given a top score (8-10) unless an explicit structural reason is stated
assertions.rationale: Precision: don't pad with off-topic people.
